title: P&C Solutions List

source.file: input_data/corpus/20200803 PC-Strategy-Solution Development and GoToMarket PlanVer1.5.xlsx

grain: one row within a solution block; each solution offering (in 'Offering') spans several stacked rows listing its modules and EXL capability-area ratings, with solution-level fields populated only on the block's lead row
summary: A catalogue of proposed P&C solution offerings, each described by problem statement, component modules, target outcomes, metrics/benchmarks, buying center, client/market appetite, an EXL-capability self-assessment (area, L/M/H rating, details), speed-to-market and next steps. This sheet is an exact copy of the 'Consolidated Solutions' sheet (same columns and values).
use_cases: What P&C solution offerings are proposed and what problem does each address?
For a given offering, what modules, outcomes, and metrics/benchmarks are listed?
Which buying center and market appetite are noted for each offering?
What EXL capability areas and L/M/H readiness back each offering?

columns.note: solution block sequence number; lead row only

columns.name: Offering
columns.note: solution/offering name; lead row of each block

columns.name:
Client Appetite / Feedback
Feedback received from clients to be updated here
Existing Capability in market (are there any existing similar products in the market?).  Describe.
Unnamed: 11
columns.note: L/M/H rating for the EXL capability area

columns.name: Unnamed: 12
columns.note: Details for the EXL capability area

examples.Problem Statement: The first step in the Claim process is FNOL and it is one of the most important...[truncated]
examples.Modules: 1. Omni Channel Intake - provides a channel agnostic claim reporting solution for customers (broker and insured)
examples.Outcomes: -Reduce claim costs - ALAE and ULAE; -Streamline and simplify the process...[truncated]
examples.Metrics and Benchmarks: TAT Non Voice - 95% assigned within 2 hours (most stringent)...[truncated]
examples.Client Appetite / Feedback\nFeedback rec: Allstate, Assurant, CNA, Hanover, HIG, Liberty Mutual
examples.Existing Capability in market (are there: More research needed here. No one has tied the whole solution together...[truncated]
examples.Unnamed: 12: Moderate footprint in FNOL both voice and non-voice across personal and commercial insurance
examples.Speed to Market: Medium. We can package and put Value Prop together quickly...[truncated]
examples.Next Steps: 1. Vet the solution concept and components with existing clients...[truncated]

examples.Modules: 2. Automated Entry FNOL capability (Thin Human/Heavy Digital)...[truncated]

not_answerable.q: What is the revenue or price of each offering?
How has appetite changed over time?

warnings: duplicate of sheet 'Consolidated Solutions' (identical column set and values); that sheet kept as canonical
two-row header band: header at row 8, sub-headers (Area/L-M-H/Details) at row 9; profiler-detected header_row corrected to 8
multi-row block layout: solution-level fields populated only on each block's lead row
